---
title: "Pipeline Pacer"
subtitle: "Keep the GPUs fed without bubbling."
description: "A browser mini-game from MLSysBook Playground. Schedule micro-batches across pipeline stages to maximize throughput without running out of memory."
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/games/common.css">
          <script type="module">
            import "../assets/games/runtime.mjs";
            import "../assets/games/pipeline.mjs";
          </script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="mlsp-game-container" role="region" aria-label="Pipeline Pacer mini-game">
  <canvas id="mlsp-canvas" class="mlsp-game-canvas" width="680" height="460"></canvas>
  <div class="mlsp-game-hud">
    <span class="mlsp-score">throughput <span id="mlsp-throughput">0</span> · score <span id="mlsp-score">0</span></span>
    <span>tap to schedule FWD · watch memory limits · <kbd>R</kbd> retry</span>
    <button type="button" class="mlsp-fullscreen-btn" onclick="this.closest('.mlsp-game-container').requestFullscreen()" title="Full Screen" aria-label="Full Screen">⛶</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="mlsp-aha-slot"></div>

<script>
(function bootPipeline(){
  function tryBoot() {
    if (!window.MLSP || !MLSP.games || !MLSP.games.pipeline) return setTimeout(tryBoot, 30);
    var canvas = document.getElementById("mlsp-canvas");
    var $score = document.getElementById("mlsp-score");
    var ahaSlot = document.getElementById("mlsp-aha-slot");
    var pendingResult = null;
    var resolvedApi = null;

    Promise.resolve(MLSP.games.pipeline(canvas, {
      onScoreChange: function(s) { $score.textContent = s.score; },
      onGameOver: function(result) {
        if (resolvedApi) attachAha(resolvedApi, result);
        else pendingResult = result;
      },
      onRetry: function() { window.location.reload(); }
    })).then(function(api) {
      resolvedApi = api;
      if (pendingResult) attachAha(api, pendingResult);
    });

    function attachAha(api, result) {
      MLSP.showAhaCard(ahaSlot, api.ahaLabel, api.ahaText, api.ahaLink);
    }
  }
  tryBoot();
})();
</script>
```

## How to play

1. Tap the canvas or press <kbd>Space</kbd> to launch a microbatch into the pipeline.
2. Launch quickly enough to avoid idle bubbles, but leave memory headroom for activations waiting on backward.
3. Survive the timer with as many completed passes as possible. Press <kbd>R</kbd> to retry.

## The Systems Concept

Pipeline parallelism is a scheduling tradeoff. More microbatches hide bubbles and improve device utilization, but each in-flight forward pass keeps activations alive until backward consumes them. Good schedules keep GPUs busy without turning memory into the bottleneck.

---

*Part of [MLSysBook Playground](/games/). Found a bug? [Report an issue](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new?labels=bug&title=Bug+in+Game).*
